events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May was born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Brian May! His guitar riffs with Queen are truly legendary. What's your favourite Queen track powered by the Red Special?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' frontman Mick Jagger was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: 83 years young and still commanding the stage! Happy Birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Rolling Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years since MTV burst onto our screens, forever changing how we consume music! Do you remember the first video ever played?

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed British music forever. What's your top track from this iconic debut?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. What's your favourite performance from the legendary festival?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977, at the age of 42. He would have been 91.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away 49 years ago today. His legacy lives on!

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Influential rapper Tupac Shakur died on September 13, 1996, six days after a drive-by shooting in Las Vegas. He would have been 55.

angles.name: Legendary Flow
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur, who tragically passed away 30 years ago today. His impact on hip-hop and culture remains profound.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Guitar icon Jimi Hendrix died on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27. He would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar Pioneer
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix, who left us 56 years ago today. His innovative guitar playing continues to inspire generations.

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Crossing
angles.copy: 57 years ago today, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. What's your favourite track from this legendary album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman Chrissie Hynde was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her distinctive voice and fierce attitude make The Pretenders truly legendary.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Biblical Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite track featuring his unmistakable vocals?

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' single (1971)
events.blurb: John Lennon released his timeless single 'Imagine' on October 11, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 55 years ago, John Lennon gave us the powerful anthem 'Imagine'. Its message of peace and unity resonates just as strongly today.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Music
angles.copy: Remember the day your entire music collection fit in your pocket? 25 years ago, Apple launched the original iPod, changing music forever.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the release of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 007 and all the iconic theme tunes that have accompanied his adventures over the decades. What's your favourite Bond song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles songwriter and peace activist John Lennon was born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Imagine His Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message continue to inspire generations worldwide.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: English actor, comedian, and writer John Cleese was born on October 27, 1939.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 87th Birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty Towers, his comedic genius is timeless.

events.title: The Beatles released 'The White Album' (1968)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: Unforgettable Double
angles.copy: 58 years ago, The Beatles unleashed 'The White Album'. A sprawling, experimental masterpiece that still sparks debate. What's your standout track?
